rationale: The citing note identifies Swait & Andrews (2003) and Feit et al. (2010) as the key prior frameworks for its hybrid RP-SP method, and the matched evidence here is only a bare DOI reference with no in-text context showing direct methodological use of 10.1509/jmkr.44.2.214. However, the cited paper is about incentive-aligned conjoint and hypothetical-bias/predictive-validity issues, which overlap with the citing paper’s concerns about conjoint distortions, so this cannot be safely treated as an obvious incidental mention.
